launches.name: Stanley For 𝕏
launches.tagline: The world's first AI Head of Content
launches.description: The world’s first AI Head of Content for Twitter that does more than just “write tweets”. He helps you think, plan, write and execute. Built on the systems of a real ghostwriter (with a proven track record of growing 𝕏 accounts from 0 to 10k followers)

launches.name: ChatGPT Images 2.0
launches.tagline: First image model with thinking capabilities
launches.description: AI image generation with a thinking layer. Create, refine, and validate visuals in one flow. Supports flexible aspect ratios and multiple outputs per prompt, making it easier to go from idea to production-ready assets fast.

launches.name: InstantDB
launches.tagline: Complete backend with auth and storage in one prompt
launches.description: Instant turns your favorite AI into a full-stack app builder. You get auth, permissions, storage, presence, and streams — everything you need to ship apps your users will love. Free to use, 100% open source. and works well for both vibe coding and production apps! You can get started by simply running `npx create-instant-app` in the terminal or just add “Read getadb.com first” to any prompt

launches.name: Nova Recruiter
launches.tagline: Agentic platform to find, contact and recruit top talent
launches.description: Nova Recruiter is the world's most advanced agentic platform to find, contact and recruit top talent. Built for recruiters, by recruiters, it allows you to search and contact candidates from +800 million public profiles worldwide. Compared to traditional platforms, it offers better filters (based on merit, not just keywords), higher reply rates (2-3x more thanks to multi-channel campaigns), AI agents to automate the sourcing workflow E2E (+95% of time saved), and usage-based pricing.

launches.name: Cai
launches.tagline: Press ⌥C on anything to run smart actions, locally
launches.description: Press ⌥C on anything to run smart actions: AI prompts, shell scripts, GitHub issues, Linear tickets, or send results anywhere... All one keystroke away. Bring your own brain: bundled Ministral 3B for zero-setup local AI, any HuggingFace MLX model for Apple Silicon speed, or connect Ollama, LM Studio, Apple Intelligence, or OpenRouter. Free, MIT licensed. No cloud, no account, no telemetry.

launches.name: Toki 2.0
launches.tagline: Automatically go from ideas to scheduled plan
launches.description: Toki 2.0 is not a calendar. It’s your AI scheduling agent. It thinks, plans, and organizes your time — before you even ask. From messy ideas to fully scheduled days, Toki handles everything: • Plans your schedule intelligently • Capture early thoughts and turn them into events • Remembers context and preferences • Automates actions with triggers Your time, finally handled.

launches.name: Tines Story copilot
launches.tagline: A conversational AI interface to build intelligent workflows
launches.description: An AI chat interface for the storyboard, Story copilot lets builders in Tines create intelligent workflows from natural language. Beyond building, use Story copilot to optimize workflows for more efficient runs and understand how complex workflows work or why actions fail. Cut build time from hours to seconds as you automate your most important workflows with Tines and Story copilot.

launches.name: Portt
launches.tagline: Transform your photo into any era and any location!
launches.description: Become part of history. Made for culture & history enthusiasts, Portt doesn't filter or face-swap — it rebuilds your entire scene with period-accurate architecture, fashion, and film grain. Pick any year from 3000 BCE to 2050. Just spin the year wheel.

launches.name: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview
launches.tagline: The flagship Qwen for agentic coding
launches.description: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview is an early release of Qwen's next proprietary flagship. It delivers measurable improvements over Qwen3.6-Plus in agentic coding, world knowledge, and instruction following, securing top scores across major development benchmarks.

launches.name: VibeAround
launches.tagline: Chat with your local AI coding agent from any IM or browser
launches.description: VibeAround is a lightweight Tauri desktop app that gives you two ways to reach your local AI coding agent from anywhere: chat from your daily IM (Telegram, Slack, Discord, Feishu…), or a browser-based web terminal with tmux support. Works with 7 agents including Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex CLI — all speaking ACP over stdio. Hand sessions between terminal and phone with /handover + /pickup, switch agents mid-conversation, Preview dev servers and markdown remotely and on your phone.

launches.name: Instant Highlights V2 by Heygen
launches.tagline: Turn long videos into viral clips in seconds
launches.description: Your video is no longer something you scroll through. Now you can just search it. With Instant Highlights V2, you type what you want, find the exact moment, and turn it into clips with captions, translations, and 4K in one place. It’s a full content system.

launches.name: kimiflare
launches.tagline: kimi k2.6 cli code editor hosted on cloudflare workers AI
launches.description: Terminal-native coding agent running on Kimi K2.6 via Cloudflare Workers AI. Bring your CloudFlare key, install the CLI, start coding. multi-turn tool use, 262k context, vision inputs, full agentic loop. one key, one bill. Cheaper per token than most hosted coding assistants and fully transparent about what it’s doing. PRs/github issues are welcome

launches.name: Loomal
launches.tagline: Identity infrastructure for AI agents
launches.description: Give your AI the "hands and legs" it needs to handle Email, 2FA, and Secure Vaults— everything an agent needs to operate in the real world. Loomal gives every agent a DKIM-signed inbox, encrypted vault, and per-action 2FA. One API. MCP-native. Works with LangChain, CrewAI, Claude, OpenAI, Cursor, and any MCP client.

launches.name: Nomie v2
launches.tagline: Replace doomscrolling with a self-care interactive world
launches.description: Nomie (mynomie.com) is a self care app for stress relief, anxiety relief, and emotional wellness. Replace doomscrolling with calming techniques, mood tracking, journaling, and daily habits that actually stick. Explore a calm, interactive world where you can walk, fly, complete self care quests, and open rewards. A somatic AI companion designed to help you regulate your nervous system, build habits, and feel better in under 60 seconds.

launches.name: ml-intern
launches.tagline: Hugging Face's AI agent that automates post-training
launches.description: An open-source AI agent that fully automates post-training: reads arXiv papers, fixes & creates datasets, runs training jobs, debugs failures, and iterates all by itself. Results: +22 pts on GPQA in 10h and +60% on HealthBench. The future of ML research is here.

launches.name: ChatFolders
launches.tagline: Folders for your AI chats with ChatGPT Claude, Gemini & Grok
launches.description: Stop scrolling through endless AI chats. ChatFolders adds folders to ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Grok — all in one extension. Drag and drop chats into color-coded folders. Bookmark, tag, and search conversations. Auto-rules sort new chats for you. Local-first — all data stays in your browser. No accounts, no cloud, no tracking. Free with 5 folders. Upgrade for unlimited folders, sub-folders, sync, and more.

launches.name: TabMail
launches.tagline: An agentic email assistant for iOS and Thunderbird
launches.description: TabMail is an agentic AI email assistant with zero data retention. Triage, compose, and search your inbox. For Thunderbird and iOS.

launches.name: Basedash Automations
launches.tagline: Your AI data analyst that works while you sleep.
launches.description: Basedash Automations puts your AI data analyst on a schedule. Kick off analyses on a recurring cadence, when your data changes, or on demand — and deliver the results to Slack and email as an AI-written report with an executive summary, key metrics, and charts. Start from 15+ templates for growth, engineering, sales, finance, customer success, and ops — or describe your own analysis in plain English. No SQL. No dashboards to babysit. Your data works for you while you sleep.

launches.name: OneGlanse
launches.tagline: Free open-source GEO tracker for LLM visibility
launches.description: A completely free, open-source GEO tracker that shows how your brand appears in real AI responses. Track visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overview using real UI outputs, not APIs. Compare competitors, analyze sources, and understand positioning. Run locally or self-hosted — your data stays with you. No subscriptions, no black-box scoring.

launches.name: Iris Studio
launches.tagline: The Swiss Army Knife for AI & Video Creators
launches.description: Generate with the latest AI models, plan on moodboards, manage assets, and edit on a full timeline — all in one desktop app.

launches.name: DecisionBox Enterprise
launches.tagline: Agent that writes SQL for you to validate database insights
launches.description: DecisionBox is an autonomous AI agent that writes SQL against your warehouse and ships validated findings. Enterprise runs it fully air-gapped: self-hosted LLMs via Ollama, open-source base models fine-tuned on your schema, SSO, RBAC, three-layer data governance, full audit log. Plugin architecture on an open-source AGPL v3 core — zero fork, zero outbound calls, zero bytes leave your network.

launches.name: BlankOut
launches.tagline: Redact your docs on-device before sharing to AI
launches.description: Every time you share a bill, medical report or bank statement to ask AI a question, the sensitive data such as name, account numbers, and address is also uploaded to a cloud server you don't control. BlankOut automatically detects and redacts sensitive information on your Android device using on-device AI. GPS & EXIF metadata stripped too. Your data never leaves your phone. AI gets only what it needs. Share a clean, redacted version of your document in one tap.

launches.name: FusedFrames
launches.tagline: Capture your team's expertise to power AI agents
launches.description: FusedFrames is a macOS app that captures years of experience from your team and provides it to your AI agents. An AI interprets every action in real time, detects decisions it can't explain from the action alone, and prompts the user to explain their reasoning. Together, the action and the reasoning are distilled into a structured pattern with a trigger, steps, reasoning and outcome, queryable by your agents over API and CLI.

launches.name: Wrangle
launches.tagline: The markdown editor that understands CLAUDE.md
launches.description: A native macOS markdown editor for developers working with Claude Code, Gemini, and AI agents. Project-level workspace switching, embedded terminals and browsers, smart notifications, token counting. $19 one-time, 3-day free trial.

launches.name: Stet
launches.tagline: Smart open-source dictation that sounds like you, not AI.
launches.description: A minimalist, open-source voice input app for macOS. It listens locally, uses AI to refine your words, and preserves your natural voice. You can bring your own API key and use it for free, or subscribe to our cloud service for $6.99/month.

launches.name: Seeknal
launches.tagline: Data & AI/ML CLI for pipelines and NL queries
launches.description: Seeknal is an all-in-one CLI for data & AI/ML engineering. Define pipelines in YAML or Python, run a safe draft → dry-run → apply workflow, materialize to PostgreSQL and Iceberg, and query your data in natural language. Three verbs: Organize (transform raw data, point-in-time joins, incrementals), Expose (dashboards, features, NL query), Action (insight → report → API → alert). Built for the agent world.

launches.name: Qria
launches.tagline: Customer feedback and review gathering with AI insights
launches.description: Qria helps small businesses collect and understand customer feedback and reviews. Build a form in minutes (star ratings, open text, multiple choice), share it as a QR code or link at your point of sale. Pull in your public reviews from Google Maps, Trustpilot, and TripAdvisor. You get a full dashboard with trends and graphs, plus an AI layer that reads across all your responses and surfaces plain-language summaries and sentiment. Built for anyone who serves customers. 30-day free trial.

launches.name: Pulsewise
launches.tagline: Create a world where every workday is a happy day.
launches.description: Pulsewise is the AI-native employee experience platform that turns every employee signal (mood, feedback, recognition, goal progress) into a clear next action for managers. Surveys, kudos, 1:1s with AI prompts, goals with nested roll-up, reviews, and hike intelligence, all in one place. No dedicated admin. Up and running in a week. Built for teams of 30 to 500 who are tired of stitching five tools together. Our belief: people experience work daily, not annually. Stop guessing. Start leading.

launches.name: Trovio 2.0
launches.tagline: The AI talent agent built into every creator's workflow
launches.description: The new Trovio has landed! Pitch Kit takes the content pillars you've built on Trovio and turns them into a pitch. Three tools, one flow: a live media kit built from your real engagement data, a shortlist of brands that fit what you actually post about, and unlimited outreach drafts written in your own voice – each anchored to a real post of yours as the proof point. No templates. No blank page. From "I want brand deals" to "I just sent a pitch" in under 5 minutes.

launches.name: JackAI Nexus
launches.tagline: AI-powered CRM + support for WhatsApp & more channels
launches.description: Nexus combines AI-powered customer support, CRM, and multi-channel communication (WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Web Chat) in one platform. Built from real deployments with embassies, universities, and service providers. Handle customer inquiries 24/7 across all channels, score leads automatically, and manage your team — all in 30 minutes of setup. Half the cost of HubSpot, 10x faster to deploy.

launches.name: SocialEcho
launches.tagline: All-channel social media autopilot for founder-led growth
launches.description: SocialEcho is an AI-powered workspace built on official APIs for secure and compliant multi-account management. It supports Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X, Telegram, Pinterest, and LinkedIn in one unified dashboard. Teams can easily publish content, engage audiences, monitor competitors, and analyze performance to scale social growth with less manual work and lower risk. Flexible APIs for publishing and data access power seamless integrations and automation.

launches.name: skillgrab
launches.tagline: One command to install AI skills that match your project
launches.description: skillgrab scans your project, detects your stack — Next.js, Django, Go, Flutter, 60+ frameworks — and installs matching AI agent skills from skills.sh in one command. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Codex, and 20+ agents. Includes an MCP server so your AI agent can call it directly from chat. Status and update commands to manage installed skills. Trusted-owner ranking and GitHub validation for security. npx skillgrab

launches.name: CachePilot
launches.tagline: Telemetry for OpenAI apps in production
launches.description: CachePilot gives you production telemetry for OpenAI apps: cache behavior, request structure, and policy effects, without storing raw prompts. BYOK, normal streaming, and visibility into what is actually happening under the hood.

launches.name: Neutral News AI
launches.tagline: Your personal BS-meter for every headline.
launches.description: Stop guessing. Start auditing. In 2026, news is a minefield. Neutral News AI provides "X-ray vision" via a Chrome extension that audits text in real-time to reveal hidden narratives. The Audit: Bias Mapping (political spectrum), BS-Meter (credibility score), Tone Analysis (info vs. outrage), and Clickbait detection. Insights appear natively via in-page overlay. Privacy-first: We audit the news, not you. No browsing history is ever stored or tracked. Decode the spin and get the facts!

launches.name: Geekflare Chat
launches.tagline: Multi AI assistant - Chat with every top AI model
launches.description: Consolidate your AI tools and save up to 90% on AI subscription costs. Geekflare Chat bundles premium models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Grok into a single workspace built for modern teams. Geekflare Chat is an all-in-one AI workspace for teams. Whether you are a founder scaling a business, a marketer analyzing competitor messaging, or a developer debugging code, our workspace brings the world's best AI models directly into your daily workflow.

launches.name: UNPWNED
launches.tagline: The security scanner that tells you how to fix it
launches.description: Security tools find problems but never tell you how to fix them. UNPWNED scans any website or GitHub repo, gives AI fix prompts for every issue, and monitors 24/7. Works in browser, CLI, or CI/CD. No security expertise needed. 5 free scans, no credit card.

launches.name: Green Chair
launches.tagline: Track colour waste. Book, sell, pay staff. One app.
launches.description: GreenChair is the all-in-one salon platform that combines colour waste tracking, online bookings, stock control, POS checkout, and staff payroll — in a single system. Built for salons that care about their craft and their footprint. Starting at €79/mo, replacing €275+ in fragmented tools.

launches.name: OpenWhistle
launches.tagline: Audio in. Structured intelligence out.
launches.description: OpenWhistle turns voice conversations into structured JSON, Markdown reports, and downstream actions. Define an agent (sales, support, HR — or your own), drop an audio file, get keyed data back. Public API, marketplace, webhooks, EU-hosted. Free to start.

launches.name: Aura (by Marxx AI)
launches.tagline: Always‑on marketing workflows that self learns and iterate
launches.description: Aura is Marxx AI’s workflow product for performance marketers. It turns the “Launch → Measure → Learn → Iterate” loop into an always‑on system—powered by 300M+ ads, 50+ creative models, and 100+ marketing MCPs. Research competitors, extract winning creative elements, generate on‑brand variations, and get fatigue/performance alerts to Slack—so small teams execute like a 50‑person agency. Workflows help you standardise your performance creative workflow. We support all SOTA models with BYOK option

launches.name: FundAlign
launches.tagline: Stop paying for 3 S&P 500 funds in a trench coat
launches.description: Your 401K probably has hidden fund overlap. FundAlign analyzes your actual holdings, shows where you're doubling up, and builds an optimal allocation. AI chat answers questions about your specific portfolio. $1.99 per analysis, no subscription.

launches.name: EmberLM
launches.tagline: Test, compare, and ship LLM prompts without guessing.
launches.description: EmberLM is a developer workspace for prompt engineering. Compare outputs across Claude, GPT-5, and Gemini side by side. Define eval rules to know when a response is good enough. Run regression tests to catch quality drops before production. Debug MCP servers with a visual inspector. Track cost per model, per prompt. When you're ready, deploy prompts to production with a one-line SDK and update them without redeploying your app. Postman for the AI era.

launches.name: SpeakON
launches.tagline: A MagSafe AI device for a post-keyboard world
launches.description: Typing is the bottleneck. SpeakON removes it. A MagSafe AI device for iPhone — press once to speak into any app. No mic permission. No switching. Even works with your phone locked. Zero friction.

launches.name: Zernio Ads API
launches.tagline: Create, manage & report ads on 6 platforms via one API
launches.description: Building ad integrations with Meta, Google, TikTok, LinkedIn, Pinterest, and X means 6 developer apps, 6 OAuth flows, 6 campaign object models, and months of engineering. Zernio replaces all of that with a single endpoint. No developer app required. Bearer token auth. One normalized data model. The Ads API joins Zernio's existing social layer: publishing, comments, DMs, and analytics across 15 platforms.

launches.name: Framework Laptop 13 Pro
launches.tagline: A Linux-first laptop with premium ambitions
launches.description: Framework Laptop 13 Pro pairs Intel Core Ultra Series 3 processors with a 21% larger battery for real 20-hour life, LPCAMM2 memory you can upgrade, and a refined CNC aluminum chassis. It keeps the repairable and modular DNA that made Framework famous.

launches.name: Cavalry Studio
launches.tagline: Free Motion Design tool by Canva
launches.description: Download Cavalry free on Mac or Windows. Real-time 2D animation, motion design, and data-driven workflows - built for animators and motion designers.

launches.name: Reference Board
launches.tagline: Infinite Canvas for your ideas
launches.description: Reference Board is a native mood board app for iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Collect images, videos, quotes, and notes on an infinite canvas, with iCloud sync across devices. Search goes beyond filenames with Apple Intelligence, generated descriptions, tags, colors, and visual feel. Private by design. Simple on the surface. Quietly powerful underneath.

launches.name: Trail
launches.tagline: turn your browsing into a private and local knowledge graph
launches.description: Everything you browse, read, and watch on your Mac, visualized — No clicking "save," no sign-ups, no browser extensions.

launches.name: ProDocktive
launches.tagline: The ultimate desktop experience, powered by your iPhone.
launches.description: Dock your iPhone. Unlock a desktop. ProDocktive extends your iPhone to any AirPlay or USB-C display — powering a full desktop experience using your phone's CPU and GPU. Your phone becomes the screen, the trackpad, the air mouse, and the hand tracker.

launches.name: EOL Dataset
launches.tagline: Find every EOL dependency in your stack. Free. In 5 minutes.
launches.description: Your SCA checks for CVEs. It doesn't check whether anyone is still maintaining the software. That's a different question, and until now, no tool answered it well. We track lifecycle status across 12M+ package versions using official EOL declarations and ML-based detection of maintainer abandonment. Upload a package.json, pom.xml, requirements.txt, or any SBOM and see exactly what's still maintained and what isn't. Direct and transitive deps. Every major ecosystem. Free of charge.

launches.name: Layers
launches.tagline: The private network strangers literally can't reach you on.
launches.description: Layers makes it architecturally impossible for strangers to message, call, or find you — not a toggle, not a setting, but enforced server-side through mutual contact verification. 100% phone-verified users. E2E encrypted. Built-in location sharing, group calendars, polls & real-time chat translation — all within your trusted circle only. No ads. No algorithm. No strangers.

launches.name: Qumin.ai
launches.tagline: AI QA that writes and runs E2E tests in under a minute
launches.description: Qumin turns plain-English requirements into self-healing end-to-end tests for web and Android ( soon ). No brittle selectors, no test maintenance, just describe what to test and Qumin generates, runs, and repairs it automatically. QA in under a minute.

launches.name: ProxyHub
launches.tagline: Tunnel, inspect & mock localhost - no backend needed
launches.description: ProxyHub is the open-source way to expose localhost, inspect every request in real time, and mock any endpoint, no account, no backend, just one npx command. Built-in API testing tool, cURL export, mock server, and self-hostable for teams.

launches.name: Basevolt
launches.tagline: Build AI-ready admin panels from your database. No cloud.
launches.description: Connect your DB, get an admin panel in seconds. Basevolt is the fastest local-first tool to manage your data without the cloud. - Instant AI: Auto-maps relationships and UI labels. Zero config. - High Performance: No cloud lag. Native CRUD, filters, and virtual joins. - Power Workflows: Trigger webhooks and custom actions locally.

launches.name: Vizro
launches.tagline: Turn any spreadsheet into a dashboard, on your phone
launches.description: Upload a CSV or Excel file, Vizro builds a real dashboard right on your phone. Story Mode explains what the data means. Ask the Data answers follow-up questions in plain English. Share with a link. Most mobile BI tools are view-only. Vizro lets you build. Built solo by a refinery IT manager who got tired of pasting spreadsheets into decks.

launches.name: AnchorHub
launches.tagline: Stop digging through Notion. Start working.
launches.description: Notion is a great library, but it’s a terrible steering wheel. We built AnchorHub for the high-stakes minutes between tasks when you need action, not documentation. AnchorHub is a bento-style mission control for your links, docs, and infra. With 1-click "Launch Control," you can fire open an entire project workspace—repos, logs, Figma, and dashboards—instantly. No more tab-digging or context-switching fatigue. Secure, encrypted, and built for teams that move fast.

launches.name: Klad: Save, Organize & Plan
launches.tagline: Save a TikTok. Get a map, recipe, or watchlist.
launches.description: You save TikToks and Reels about restaurants, recipes, and movies. Then forget them forever. Klad turns any link into something useful, paste a TikTok, get an interactive map with the exact spot pinned. Share a recipe Reel, get a step-by-step checklist. Add a movie recommendation, it goes straight to your watchlist. No more screenshots. No more "where did I save that?" Just paste a link and Klad does the rest.

launches.name: NotebookLM Hub
launches.tagline: The missing Chrome extension for NotebookLM power users
launches.description: The all-in-one Chrome extension for NotebookLM power users. One-click import from any webpage, smart source annotations, real-time source tracking, and link extraction — with Obsidian & Notion sync coming soon. Free.

launches.name: MsgFlash
launches.tagline: WhatsApp API Infrastructure for Builders & No-coders.
launches.description: Stop fighting with bloated CRMs. MsgFlash is the "Stripe for WhatsApp" a lean, API-first infrastructure for builders. • 5-min setup: One API key, one endpoint. • Anti-Ban Engine: Smart Health Score to protect your numbers. • E-commerce Ready: Native Shopify, WordPress, Zapier & Make integrations. • Hybrid Power: Clean REST API + a powerful Dashboard for mass campaigns.

launches.name: Vibestat
launches.tagline: You shipped it. Now find out what's broken
launches.description: Free SEO, performance and security audit for vibe-coded and AI-built websites. Paste a URL, get a plain-English report plus AI summary in 10 seconds. No signup.

launches.name: ProtoWall
launches.tagline: Share prototypes under NDA. No code changes required.
launches.description: Put an authentication and NDA wall in front of your prototypes. Invite specific people, require legal acceptance, and proxy traffic to your app. No code changes required. Every action is audit-logged with timestamps, IPs, and signatures. NDAs are versioned; update the text and existing reviewers must re-accept. Revoke access instantly with one click. Free tier includes 1 project and 5 invites.

launches.name: Zone 2 Heart Rate Calculator
launches.tagline: Find your Zone 2 range using MAF, Karvonen & % Max HR
launches.description: Most Zone 2 calculators use one formula. This runs all three — MAF, Karvonen, and % of Max HR — simultaneously so you see the full picture. Enter your age, resting heart rate, and fitness level. Get your Zone 2 range three ways, a complete 5-zone training table, weekly volume recommendations, and plain-English explanations. Free. No signup. No email. Built for runners, cyclists, and anyone serious about aerobic base training and longevity.

launches.name: ClickTerm
launches.tagline: Clickwrap agreements made beautifully simple.
launches.description: ClickTerm is clickwrap agreement software that helps businesses capture legally enforceable user consent with signed certificates and audit trails.

launches.name: InvoiceWise
launches.tagline: Generate and send all your monthly invoices in one click
launches.description: Tired of recreating the same invoices every month? InvoiceWise lets you generate all recurring invoices in one click, review them, and send them instantly. No complex accounting — just a fast workflow for monthly billing.
